description: Rotten Tomatoes is a movie and TV discovery and reviews site that aggregates critic and audience scores, reviews, and related entertainment metadata. Its public website currently directs API and data-feed inquiries through a help desk / licensing contact path.
summary: Rotten Tomatoes exposes one known legacy HTTP API surface, the Rotten Tomatoes Public API at `http://api.rottentomatoes.com/api/public/v1.0`, documented by an unofficial OpenAPI spec and authenticated with an `apikey` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
